steps.title: Rewrite line p
steps.content:
Put $3y+24x=15$ in slope-intercept form:
$$3y=-24x+15$$
$$y=-8x+5$$
So line $p$ has slope $-8$.

steps.title: Use the perpendicular rule
steps.content:
Perpendicular slopes are negative reciprocals. The negative reciprocal of $-8$ is:
$$-\frac{1}{-8}=\frac{1}{8}$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A — $-8$ is the original slope. Choice B — $-\frac{1}{8}$ has the wrong sign. Choice D — $8$ is not the reciprocal. Choice C — $\frac{1}{8}$ is $\frac{1}{8}$.

steps.title: Answer
steps.content: The slope of line $r$ is $\frac{1}{8}$, so C is correct.
